steps.assistant_text: FP register-pool coloring rules (cap disproven): named float locals draw from pool {f0,f2,f12,f14}; single-BB locals color from pool START in def order; BB-crossing pseudos color from pool END in crossing order; an empty if(cond){} creates the BB boundary while folding to zero instructions. Body: loads a,b,c,d; store c; store d; if(!d){} store b; if(b){} store a; call — d->f0, c->f2, b->f12, a->f14.
